login.descripcion: Continuous monitoring, early alerts and verifiable traceability for the preservation of temperature-sensitive medicines.
login.proveedorNoDisponible: Sign-in with {{proveedor}} will be available once the OAuth provider is configured.
login.errorDemasiadosIntentos: Too many failed attempts. Wait a few minutes and try again.
login.errorServidor: Could not reach the server. Please try again.
login.sesionCerradaRecarga: For your security, the session closes when the page reloads. Please sign in again.

detalle.riesgo_preventivo: Approaching the limit: keep an eye on the refrigerator
detalle.excursion_critica: Outside the 2–8 °C range: check the refrigerator now

ia.sinInferencia: No AI inference for this reading

dashboard.descripcion: Thermal status of the pharmaceutical refrigerator
dashboard.esperandoDetalle: The panel will update automatically once the ESP32 device publishes readings.

demo.descripcionBadge: Simulated data: the application runs without a server connection
demo.accesoDetalle: Pick a role to explore the system with simulated data. No password required.

historial.sinResultados: No readings match the selected filters.

alertas.descripcion: Alerts generated by the thermal risk classifier
alertas.sinAlertas: No alerts on record. The refrigerator remains stable.
alertas.soloFarmaceutico: Only pharmacy technical staff can mark alerts as reviewed.

trazabilidad.descripcion: Every record is digitally sealed: any tampering is detected by the system
trazabilidad.cadenaIntegraDetalle: All {{n}} records are unmodified since their creation.
trazabilidad.cadenaRotaDetalle: Record #{{n}} was altered or damaged. Notify the administrator and preserve this evidence.
trazabilidad.selloAyuda: SHA-256 cryptographic fingerprint: links this record to the previous one and makes any tampering evident

checklist.nota: Based on the Good Storage Practices Manual (MINSA regulation). Progress is stored locally on this device.

items.temperatura: The refrigerator records temperature within the 2–8 °C range
items.termometro: The temperature sensor sits next to the product, not on the wall
items.registros: Today's thermal records are complete and available
items.alertasRevisadas: Pending alerts have been reviewed and addressed
items.limpieza: The refrigerator is clean and free of frost build-up
items.exclusivo: The refrigerator is used exclusively for pharmaceutical products
items.rotulado: Products are labelled with visible expiry dates
items.respaldo: A contingency plan exists for power outages

reportes.descripcion: Export documentary evidence for audits and inspections
reportes.notaFormatos: The CSV opens in Excel for review and printing; the JSON keeps the full technical evidence (digital seals included).
reportes.sinReporte: Set the period and generate a report to see the summary.
reportes.errorGenerar: The report could not be generated.

auditoria.descripcion: Critical actions recorded in the system

usuarios.descripcion: Control who can access the system and what each role can do
usuarios.errorDuplicado: A user with that email already exists.

comunes.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
comunes.sesionExpirada: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
comunes.sinPermiso: You do not have permission to view this section.
